project_title: AI-supported energy efficiency platform for manufacturing SMEs
project_description: We are developing a digital decision-support platform that helps manufacturing SMEs reduce energy consumption through sensor-based monitoring, predictive analytics, and operational recommendations. The project aims to improve industrial energy efficiency, reduce emissions, and support greener production processes across multiple EU regions.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with calls related to industrial energy efficiency, low-emission manufacturing, sustainability, digital innovation, and SME support.
likely_false_positive_patterns: generic ICT or software calls with no sustainability relevance
broad SME digitalization calls without energy or industrial focus
consumer energy apps or household sustainability topics

project_title: Circular recovery of critical raw materials from industrial waste
project_description: Our project focuses on recovering critical raw materials from industrial and electronic waste streams through a scalable circular processing method. We want to combine material traceability, resource efficiency, and pilot-scale validation to reduce dependency on imported raw materials and strengthen European industrial resilience.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with critical raw materials, circular economy, recycling, strategic autonomy, industrial resilience, and pilot validation.
likely_false_positive_patterns: generic sustainability calls with no materials focus
waste management topics unrelated to raw material recovery
environmental awareness calls without industrial innovation content

project_title: Port optimization using AI for vessel and logistics efficiency
project_description: We are designing an AI-based optimization system for port operations that improves vessel scheduling, cargo flow coordination, and energy-efficient logistics planning. The solution is intended for large port ecosystems and supports sustainable maritime innovation, operational efficiency, and lower environmental impact.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with maritime logistics, ports, sustainable transport, operational optimization, and digital innovation in infrastructure.
likely_false_positive_patterns: general supply chain software calls with no maritime relevance
road transport optimization calls
smart city logistics calls without port or shipping context

project_title: Smart port security and anomaly detection platform
project_description: This project develops a security platform for critical port infrastructure using sensor fusion, anomaly detection, and real-time monitoring. The goal is to improve threat detection, operational awareness, and resilience against physical and digital disruption in complex logistics environments.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with security, critical infrastructure protection, resilience, anomaly detection, threat monitoring, and dual physical-digital protection.
likely_false_positive_patterns: generic cybersecurity awareness calls
broad smart monitoring calls with no security relevance
logistics optimization calls without resilience or threat focus

project_title: Pilot line for low-emission industrial process innovation
project_description: We want to validate a pilot-scale industrial process that reduces emissions and resource consumption in advanced manufacturing. The project includes prototype refinement, pilot testing, and cross-border industrial demonstration with research and industry partners.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with pilot line activity, industrial demonstration, advanced manufacturing, low-emission processes, and collaborative industrial innovation.
likely_false_positive_patterns: early-stage research calls with no demo or pilot orientation
general sustainability calls with no manufacturing relevance
academic materials science topics without industrial validation

project_title: Shore power and energy management optimization for ports
project_description: We are developing a decision-support system for ports to optimize shore power usage, electricity demand balancing, and energy planning for vessel berthing operations. The project aims to reduce port-related emissions while improving infrastructure efficiency and operational planning.
expected_fit_notes: Should align with both maritime and green energy themes, especially port decarbonization, infrastructure efficiency, and operational sustainability.
likely_false_positive_patterns: generic grid optimization calls with no port relevance
maritime logistics calls with no energy angle
broad climate calls with no infrastructure or operational component

project_description: We are exploring a digital collaboration platform that helps regional innovation actors exchange project opportunities, connect around shared priorities, and structure innovation initiatives more effectively. The concept is still broad, but the intended use is around innovation support, ecosystem coordination, and funding readiness.
expected_fit_notes: This should test whether the system remains useful but cautious when the input is meaningful yet strategically broad and under-specified.
likely_false_positive_patterns: any broad digitalization call
generic SME platform calls
unrelated collaboration tools with no innovation-policy or funding relevance
